Patch Set 1:

Failed enforced test custom-1001 on RHEL 8.10 / x86_64 uploaded by Onyx Autotest 2 from onyx-150vm4: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/960f329d-56a6-4110-b9a5-85968cd766a3 ran 3 tests.  1 tests failed: sanity-lnet.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I see what the problem is. idx in the loop is not the same as idx for every NI existing. We use idx to keep track of where we are in the list of NIs are interested in. The easier solution is replace lnet_get_ni_stats() with a direct call to lnet_usr_translate_stats(). The only reason we need the idx is so lnet_get_ni_stats() looks up the NI but we already have the NI. Also lnet_usr_trasnlate_stats() doesn't need msg_stats->im_idx set.

Patch Set 1:

Failed enforced test review-ldiskfs-dne on RHEL 9.4 / x86_64 uploaded by Onyx Autotest 2 from onyx-24vm4: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/fa0f6a2f-349f-419d-85f9-64b18c76ad2e ran 5 tests.  1 tests failed: sanity-lnet.

Patch Set 1:

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> I see what the problem is. idx in the loop is not the same as idx for every NI existing. We use idx to keep track of where we are in the list of NIs are interested in. The easier solution is replace lnet_get_ni_stats() with a direct call to lnet_usr_translate_stats(). The only reason we need the idx is so lnet_get_ni_stats() looks up the NI but we already have the NI. Also lnet_usr_trasnlate_stats() doesn't need msg_stats->im_idx set.

Yes, I dropped the needed block you commented before, because there was only one variable in the code and it wasn't making any sense (the value was overwritten, and the condition became useless). Thank you for giving me some input.
I will write a new fix considering that.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 1:

Is this still needed - or does James's patch remove the need for it?

commit.subject: LU-18621 lnet: fix wrong lnetctl_net_show if net
commit.message:
LU-18621 lnet: fix wrong lnetctl_net_show if net

When net is specified with lnetctl net show, lnet_get_ni_stats has a
wrong idx (0), hence the stats are about lo lnd.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Fixes: 8f8f6e2f36e ("LU-10003 lnet: use Netlink to support old and new NI APIs.")
Signed-off-by: Cyril Bordage <cbordage@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I6fc2a0da176a8824b5535f06cbe70d81dd153795
